Name: OpenAI
Description: OpenAI is an AI research and deployment platform.
Industry: Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine learning, Software development

Name: Neuralink
Description: Neuralink is a company that develops brain-computer interface (BCI) devices to assist people with paralysis and blindness and technologies that may expand the abilities of humans.

Name: Cere Network
Description: Cere Network is a decentralized data cloud platform built on Polkadot.

Name: Dialpad
Description: Dialpad is a San Francisco-headquartered business communications platform company.

Name: Forte
Description: An end-to-end blockchain and NFT solution for video games.
Industry: Video game, Tokenization, Decentralized autonomous organization (DAO)

Name: Anthropic
Description: AI safety and research platform.

Name: Ignite
Description: Tendermint is now Ignite. Tendermint was the core contributor to the Cosmos blockchain network.

Name: Chime Bank
Description: A bank offering online banking services with no user no bank fees, and an option to receive direct deposit up to two days early. Chris Britt and Ryan King founded Chime in 2013, and the company is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

Name: Fractal
Description: Fractal is a gaming marketplace developed to facilitate non-fungible tokens (NFTs).

Name: Numerai
Description: Numerai is a hedge fund with stock market trades determined by crowdsourced artificial intelligence models. The best models receive rewards in the form of a cryptographic token called Numeraire (NMR) on the Ethereum blockchain.

Name: LangChain
Description: LangChain is an open-source framework for developing applications powered by language models.

Name: Medium
Description: An online publishing platform used by amateur and professional writers. Membership fees are used to pay writers.

Name: CryptoKitties
Description: CryptoKitties is a game built on the Ethereum blockchain in which users can collect and trade virtual kittens.

Name: Celo
Description: Celo is an open platform that offers financial tools to mobile phone users.

Name: TriNet Zenefits
Description: TriNet Zenefits is a software as a service (SaaS) company providing a digital human resources platform for small- and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs).
Industry: Human resources, Human resource management, Enterprise software

Name: Mammoth Biosciences
Description: Mammoth Biosciences is an American company based in San Francisco founded on June 1, 2017. Mammoth Biosciences uses CRISPR technology to develop bio-sensing technologies for diagnostics in industries such as healthcare, agriculture, manufacturing, and forensics and genome editing therapeutics.

Name: Calm
Description: Calm is a health technology start-up based in San Francisco. It was founded in 2012 by Alex Tew and Michael Acton Smith and produces a mobile application for sleep, relaxation, and meditation.

Name: Phantom
Description: Phantom is a cryptocurrency wallet by Solana to manage digital assets and access decentralized applications.
Industry: Blockchain and cryptocurrency, Financial technology, Cryptocurrency wallet

Name: Humane
Description: Humane develops and commercializes consumer hardware, software, and services.

Name: Discord
Description: Discord is an American company that offers users a free messenger with support for IP telephony and video conferencing. About 56 million people use the Discord messenger every month, and its total audience exceeds 270 million users.

Name: Pembient
Description: Pembient uses advances in biotechnology to fabricate horn and other wildlife products to combat the threat to endangered species.

Name: Forge
Description: Forge, formerly Equidate, is a company that offers a marketplace for private stock liquidation.

Name: HashiCorp
Description: HashiCorp is a software company providing tools for developers and security professionals to provision, secure, and run infrastructure for distributed applications for organizations.
Industry: Security automation, Information infrastructure, Enterprise software

Name: Pachama
Description: Pachama is a company estimating carbon storage in forests and predicting future deforestation or potential for forest restoration with the use of satellite images.

Name: Parallel Finance
Description: Parallel Finance is a decentralized lending and staking protocol on Polkadot and Ethereum.
Industry: Smart contract, Decentralized Finance, Financial services

Name: Indee Labs
Description: Indee Labs focuses on the development of microfluidic vortex shedding for rapidly and efficiently transfecting human primary immune cells with negligible perturbation. The team is focused on developing its core technology for short turnaround chimeric antigen receptor T cell (CAR-T) development and manufacturing.

Name: Faire
Description: Faire is a curated boutique wholesale marketplace connecting local retailers with thousands of emerging and established brands.

Name: Layer1
Description: Layer1 is a cryptocurrency investment and infrastructure platform.

Name: Flexport
Description: Flexport is a licensed freight forwarder and shipping company based in San Francisco, CA, USA. They manage global logistics for businesses.

Name: Brex
Description: Brex is a credit card company that issues corporate credit cards with no security deposit.

Name: Primer
Description: Primer is a San Francisco-based company developing AI to generate written intelligence reports.
Industry: Natural language processing (NLP), Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine learning

Name: GitStart
Description: GitStart is a "Pull Request as a Service" platform founded in 2019 by Hamza Zia.

Name: Mysten Labs
Description: Data.ai, formerly known as App Annie, is a unified data and artificial intelligence (AI) company that combines consumer and market data to provide AI-powered insights into mobile app market data.
Industry: Cryptocurrency, Non-fungible token (NFT), Software, Mobile commerce, Software as a service (SaaS), Cloud computing, Analytics, Marketing, Data science

Name: Clubhouse (social media company)
Description: Clubhouse is a San Francisco-based social app offering a space for casual, drop-in audio conversations with friends and other interesting people.

Name: Sightcall
Description: Sightcall is a San Francisco-based company founded in 2008.
Industry: Customer experience, Cloud management, Cloud computing

Name: Full Circle Biochar
Description: Full Circle Biochar is a developer of products and technologies based on bio-charcoal for the agricultural markets.

Name: Elastic
Description: Elastic is a software company that creates products for searching for information on the Internet. It was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in San Francisco and Amsterdam.
Industry: Data visualization, Software as a service (SaaS), Artificial Intelligence (AI)
Founders: Steven Schuurman Facebook, Shay Banon, Uri Boness

Name: Perfect Day Foods
Description: Perfect Day Foods (formerly Muufri) engineered yeast capable of producing the proteins found in cows milk. They use these proteins to make their own line of animal-free dairy products.

Name: Paravision
Description: Paravision is a San Francisco-based provider of facial recognition and activity monitoring software. Paravision was previously known as Ever AI.

Name: Density
Description: Density is a San Francisco-based company building a people-counting system to measure the number of people in or passing through a physical space such as a hallway, lobby, or conference hall.

Name: Hasura
Description: Hasura is a software and development tools company, offering tools for developers to simplify application development.
Industry: Platform as a service (PaaS), Web development tools, Software

Name: EquBot
Description: Artificial intelligence company who uses models and IBM's Watson in the management of their AI Powered Equity Fund ETF (AIEQ) and AI Powered International Equity ETF (AIIQ)

Name: Superhuman
Description: A company offering an email client designed to be the fastest email experience. The company was founded by Conrad Irwin, Rahul Vohra, and Vivek Sodera in 2015 and is headquartered in San Francisco, California.

Name: Loom
Description: Loom is a software company that develops communication software for asynchronous presentations through sharable video recordings.
Industry: Collaboration tool, Software as a service (SaaS), Platform as a service (PaaS)

Name: TrustArc
Description: TrustArc is a San Francisco-based developer of privacy compliance and risk management software for GDPR, CCPA, and related regulations.

Name: MetaMap
Description: MetaMap is an identity verification platform for businesses. Solutions for user onboarding and authentication and KYC & AML compliance.

Name: CodeSignal
Description: CodeSignal is developing a skills-based assessment platform for unbiased hiring within companies.

Name: Zapier
Description: Zapier is an American for-profit corporation and a web-based service that allows end users to integrate the web applications they use.

Name: New Wave Foods
Description: New Wave Foods is a biotechnology company developing plant-based shellfish food products. The company is based out of San Francisco, California and was founded in 2015 by Dominique Barnes and Michelle Wolf.

Name: Iterative.ai
Description: Iterative.ai is a machine learning and artificial intelligence training platform provider.

Name: PlanetScale
Description: PlanetScale is a database-as-a-service platform acting as a middleware system for MySQL.
Industry: Big data, Software as a service (SaaS), Enterprise software

Name: Postman
Description: Postman is a San Francisco-based software company offering an API development environment.

Name: Finless Foods
Description: Finless Foods is a biotechnology company producing cultured marine animal food products through implementing cellular agriculture and manufacturing technologies.
Industry: Food technology, Alternative proteins, Cellular agriculture

Name: Just, Inc.
Description: Just, Inc. (formerly known as Hampton Creek) is a food technology company developing and selling plant based food products around the world.

Name: Nurx
Description: Nurx is a telemedicine service company that delivers oral contraceptives and various testing kits to its customers. It was founded in 2015 and has headquarters in San Francisco, California.

Name: Scale AI
Description: Scale AI is an artificial intelligence company making an API for validating and training data for applications.
Industry: Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine learning, AI Copywriting

Name: DeHorizon
Description: DeHorizon is committed to becoming the next generation of Metaverse Game Ecosystem, where players can immersively create, socialize, entertain with other peer players.

Name: Bugcrowd
Description: Bugcrowd is an enterprise cloud computing and computer security crowdsourcing company that offers a platform for security testing, web, mobile, source code, and client-side applications.
Industry: Computer security, Internet of things (IoT), Crowdsourcing

Name: Eat Just
Description: Eat Just is a San Francisco based food technology company founded in 2011. The company is known for its bean-based egg substitute called Just Egg. Eat Just also produces egg-free mayonnaise.

Name: Upside Foods
Description: Upside Foods is a San Francisco-based company making cultured meat products. The company was founded by Uma Valeti, Nicholas Genovese, and Will Clem.
Founders: Uma Valeti ***@upsidefoods.com, Nicholas Genovese, Will Clem

Name: Grail
Description: Grail is a biotechnology company headquartered in Menlo Park, California that was founded as a spinoff of Illumina Inc and initially headed by Jeffrey Huber in 2016, focused on making a medical device that can detect early stage cancer.
Founders: Jessica Owens, Jeff Huber, Alex Aravanis

Name: Hinge Health
Description: The World's First Digital Clinic for Back and Joint Pain
Industry: Microbiome and Gut Health, Healthcare, Life science

Name: Plivo
Description: Plivo is a cloud-based communications platform as a service (CPaaS) company headquartered in San Francisco, California. The company allows software developers to integrate phone calls, text messages, and other communication functions into their applications using its web service APIs.
Industry: Telecommunications, Software as a service (SaaS), Chat (industry)

Name: Distil Networks
Description: Distil Networks was an American cybersecurity company founded in 2011 and headquartered in San Francisco, California.

Name: Deel
Description: Deel is a technology company offering a human resources management system solution for businesses working with global remote contractors.

Name: Grove Collaborative
Description: Grove Collaborative is an online, subscription-based retailer selling natural home and health products.

Name: About.me
Description: About.me is a company that has developed a platform for users to make personal and professional websites.
Industry: Social media, Advertising, Platform as a service (PaaS)
